seedNotes: Pinned Umami seed-data creates Demo Blog at blog.example.com and Demo SaaS at app.example.com with 30 days of sessions, page paths, custom events, and revenue data.

conversations.description: Ask for the highest-traffic pages on the seeded Demo SaaS site.
prompts: For Demo SaaS at app.example.com, show the top pages by views for the last 7 days. Include the page labels and view counts in the visible answer.

conversations.description: Ask about seeded Demo Blog article performance.
prompts: On Demo Blog, compare traffic for /blog/privacy-first-tracking and /blog/getting-started-with-analytics this month. Include each article path and its count in the visible answer.

conversations.description: Ask for seeded purchase/revenue tracking on Demo SaaS.
prompts: Summarize purchase revenue for Demo SaaS this month and break it down by pro versus enterprise if the data is available. Include revenue labels and numeric values in the visible answer.

conversations.description: Ask for signup funnel events seeded on Demo SaaS.
prompts: For app.example.com, compare signup_started and signup_completed events over the last 30 days and include the conversion rate. Include event labels and numeric values in the visible answer.

conversations.description: Ask for a behavioral acquisition breakdown on the seeded Demo Blog.
prompts: For blog.example.com, show the top referrers or traffic sources for the last 30 days. Include source labels and counts in the visible answer.
